title: Simple Page Layout with Areas
description: Create a page layout with header, nav, main content, and footer using grid-template-areas. Nav should be on the left, main content fills the rest, and both header and footer span the full width.
hint: Header and footer span both columns ('header header' and 'footer footer'). Nav is in column 1, main in column 2 for row 2.

title: Responsive Magazine Layout
description: Build a magazine layout that shifts from 3-column desktop to 2-column tablet to 1-column mobile using grid-template-areas. The layout should have a featured article (spanning 2 columns), a sidebar, two regular articles, and a footer.

starterCode.html:
Featured Article (spans 2 cols)
Sidebar
Article 1
Article 2
Footer

hint: At tablet: stack sidebar below articles. Use `grid-template-areas: 'featured featured' 'art1 sidebar' 'art2 sidebar' 'footer footer'`. At mobile: single column with `'featured' 'sidebar' 'art1' 'art2' 'footer'`.

title: Complex Dashboard with Nested Areas
description: Build a dashboard layout with 5 distinct zones: top toolbar, sidebar navigation, main chart area, notification panel (right side), and bottom stats bar. Use grid-template-areas to define the layout. The chart area should span 2 rows vertically. All content must be reorderable via CSS only for responsive views.

starterCode.html:
Toolbar
Sidebar Nav
Main Chart
Notifications
Stats Bar

hint: Desktop: 3 columns (200px 1fr 200px), 3 rows (auto 1fr auto). Areas: 'toolbar toolbar toolbar', 'sidebar chart notifs', 'sidebar stats notifs'. The chart spans 1 row but sidebar and notifs span 2 rows. Mobile: single column placing items vertically.
